title: Assistant Store Manager - Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions:
Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions!
